query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.totalSpent, 
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.orderDate >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) THEN CAST(o.total AS DECIMAL(12,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ltvOneYear
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.customerId = c.id 
  AND o.orderStatus != -1 AND o.isShipped = 1 AND o.shippedAt IS NOT NULL
  AND (o.orderStatusText = '已完成' OR o.orderStatusText IS NULL) 
  AND (o.shippingStatus IS NULL OR o.shippingStatus != '已退貨')
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.totalSpent
HAVING ltvOneYear > 0
LIMIT 10;

  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.orderDate >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) THEN CAST(o.total AS DECIMAL(12,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ltvOneYear
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.customerId = c.id 
  AND o.orderStatus != -1 AND o.isShipped = 1 AND o.shippedAt IS NOT NULL
  AND (o.orderStatusText = '已完成' OR o.orderStatusText IS NULL) 
  AND (o.shippingStatus IS NULL OR o.shippingStatus != '已退貨')
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.totalSpent
HAVING ltvOneYear > 0
LIMIT 10;
